/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/bme/cfg.h File Reference

Routines to perform shim configuration operations. More...


Defines

#define SHIM_PROBE_TIMEOUT   4000
 Number of times cfg_probe() checks for a reply from an I/O shim before deciding it doesn't exist.

Functions

void bme_cfg_wr (pos_t dest, uint32_t chan, uint32_t addr, uint32_t data)
 Write to an I/O shim configuration register.
uint32_t bme_cfg_rd (pos_t dest, uint32_t chan, uint32_t addr)
 Read from an I/O shim configuration register.
int bme_cfg_probe (pos_t dest, uint32_t chan, uint32_t addr, uint32_t *rval)
 Probe an I/O shim configuration register.

Detailed Description

Routines to perform shim configuration operations.

These functions send messages over the IDN to I/O shims, retrieving or modifying the contents of shim configuration registers. These routines send IDN messages, and expect to be able to accept replies, on IDN0; that endpoint must be enabled (with any tag), and message reception on it must not provoke any interrupts.
